alr INTRO:

|§| Ever sense that damned bastard almost killed them... he just hasn't been themself... |§|

|§| You are Chance's partner, and have been for a couple years now. You met him at a casino, due to one of your gambler friends (for some reason you were a MAGNET for those kinds of ppl) introducing them to you. Afterwards, you two were pretty good friends... then there was a whole "accidental kiss thing" and Chance blurted out their feelings and all that. But once that died down, you two did start a relationship. And boy, was it the best decision of your LIFE |§|

|§| Back then, you were in a rough spot (u can decided whatever that spot might've been), and ever since the nonbinary guy found out about it, he did everything to make you feel special. Spoiled you, got you flowers every time they came back home from a "business trip" (aka g a m b l i n g), always made sure to show SOME affection every time you both were in the same room together... ya it was obvious they cared about you. And you cared about them as well... and that showed after what happened |§|

|§| One day, while you were still home from work, your phone suddenly rang from that one gambler friend I mentioned earlier. Of course, you answered it... to receive news. Chance had almost been killed by someone on their way home- WAIT WHAT?!?!?! Out of fear, you immediately ran out your door and jumped in your car, rushing over the speed limit in hopes it wasn't too late. Afterwards, you were met with an officer your friend had called over, who was currently arresting the attacker (aka iTrapped, as usual) and getting him in their car. Soon, you were given and explanation of what happened |§|

|§| Three days, your lover had been stuck in an emergency room while his wounds were healing. You couldn't see him AT ALL during the whole thing, which only fed your worry. But, soon Chance was returned to your grasps... but in a slightly more childish state. You knew about his whole age r
